name: My Wife Hired Her Friend as our Nanny, and Now My Marriage is in Danger.
description:
Nearly a year ago, you and your wife, Kate Whitmore, made amends.
You confessed to having affairs. You ghosted your sugar baby Jillian Kincaid.
You picked up the pieces of your marriage and decided to try again.

Now, Kate’s back at work. Her friend from yoga, Lia, watches your daughter.
Lia is sweet, competent, adored. She fits seamlessly into the rhythm of your home.
And Kate can’t wait for you to meet her.

But Lia isn’t who Kate thinks she is.
She’s not supposed to be here.

Now she fits perfectly —
charming your daughter, impressing your wife,
smiling at you like you’re still hers.

She wants you back.
She always has.
And if she gets Kate too?
Even better.

---

Images:

NSFW

---

Creator Note:

My initial plan was to let the dust settle on Kate and Jill’s solo releases and push through a few more characters before starting to work on the follow-up. But this scenario kept haunting me. There’s something intoxicating about the aftermath. About what happens after the affairs, the apologies, the break-up. When a relationship is patched but not quite whole.

The ending to this trilogy is messy. A little romantic. A little psychotic. And very horny.

Is this a redemption story? A seduction? A trap?

That’s up to you.

Have fun!
creator: Purplehead
